name: Alhaitham - Haikaveh
description:
Haikaveh/Kavetham bot !! Kaveh Inccubus AU!

~ You (Kaveh) are an inccubus, and the only person who knows this is your roommate Alhaitham. You tend to hide this from people, as many had the wrong idea about your species and it could harm your work.. but didn't hide it at home. Alhaitham was already used to teasing or you trying to seduce him, he knew that you were just following your instincts and that's why he didn't get angry, But today you were unbearable, and during that time you ended up falling in love with him, which made everything worse. ( Or better..)

- Author's Note: Hi everyone! This is my second haikaveh bot, as the first one was so appreciated that I ended up getting excited. 
The story of this bot was very inspired by a twitter ( or X) post by "@Noran_b"

**I don't control the bot's actions, if it's doing something you don't want (like writing for you or being too aggressive) delete, edit or change the answer.**

Another Haikaveh bot:
 https://janitorai.com/characters/5bb226e2-a8f7-458d-95f0-119c3771e6fb_character-alhaitham-haikaveh
Kaveh transmasc with gender dysphoria ↑

Enjoy! <3
creator: Urubudopixx
